metrics.sameDocumentArchitecture: games/<slug>/index.html hosts the playable canvas/board directly; play.html is an outer iframe route that loads those documents.

failures: A real Google AdSense publisher ID is required before H5 release.
Official H5 Games Ads / Ad Placement API access must be confirmed.
H5_GAMES_ADS_ENABLED must be true for H5 release.
At least one H5 placement type should be enabled for H5 release.
ownerActions: Standard AdSense account must be approved first.
Apply separately for H5 Games Ads / Ad Placement API.
Only then set H5_GAMES_ADS_ACCESS_APPROVED to true.
Use H5_ADS_TEST_MODE only for local/staging validation.
Exclude player/game routes from Auto Ads in the AdSense dashboard if overlays conflict with gameplay.
